calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing, No appearance by or on behalf of defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Susan Parkinson, Esq., for the Plaintiff PYRAMID GROUP INC.
Henry Tang sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant MATTHEW TRASHER.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 640 C;au Street. #204, San Francisco, California 94111.

Holdover damages $1,216.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,216.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Z. Shapiro; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Pyramid Goup Inc. is present. Represented by Henry Tan.
Attorney Susan Parkinson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Matthew Thrasher DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of MAY-18-2015 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
